title: Reporting template hub updated
body: New templates added: Participant List, Concept Note, Incident Reporting Form, and Consent Form. Check the Reporting Template page.
details: The Reporting Template cabinet now has 19 templates across five categories: Planning Preparation, Reporting Template & Evidence Generation, Human Interest History, Accountability, and Communication and Branding Promoting Template. Newly added this round: Participant List (Camp and Common), Concept Note, Incident Reporting Form, General Incident Report, and Consent Form — all matching the Annexure A3 formats where applicable. Visit the Reporting Template page and use the search box to find any of them quickly.

title: Safeguarding refresher training — save the date
body: All field staff are requested to attend the safeguarding and PSHEA refresher session. Details to follow from the MEAL focal person.
details: This refresher covers the Code of Conduct, PSEA reporting channels, and how to use the Incident Reporting Form and Consent Form on this site. Attendance is mandatory for all field-facing staff. Date, time, and venue will be shared by the MEAL focal person — check back here or contact Mohasan Uddin directly for the latest schedule.

title: SURAKKHA project portal launched
body: This site is now live for staff use — templates, project information, and contacts in one place.
details: The portal brings together the Home notice board, project background and library, reporting channels by intervention area, the full reporting template cabinet, a dashboard (in progress), and direct contact details for the MEAL and CFRM focal persons. Everything on this site can be updated by editing simple CSV files — no coding required. See the CSV Update Guide for instructions.

title: Reporting Timeline and Document Submission
body: All activity reports must be submitted within 2 working days after the completion of the event. The complete reporting package, along with all required supporting documents, must be shared with the MEAL Team, Project Coordinator, Finance Team, and Administration Team within the reporting deadline.
details: Ensure all documents are complete, signed, and uploaded to the designated project folder before submission.
